creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 186481
svn diff for www/otrs

Started due to https://reviews.freebsd.org/D12308, USE_* should not be used after including bsd.port.pre.mk

With the new OPTIONS, there's no need for pre/options/post any longer as shown in the patch.

Please test and let me know if this works for you, I'll commit it.
